repair_candidate.summary: Create a narrow replacement PR for the DeepSeek/Xiaomi prefix-matching prompt cache regression by preserving or adding a disableBoundaryAwareCache compatibility option for OpenAI-compatible providers, based on the useful but uneditable #95311 and closed #94582 source work.
repair_candidate.pr_body:
## Summary
- add or preserve a disableBoundaryAwareCache compatibility path for prefix-matching OpenAI-compatible providers
- keep DeepSeek/Xiaomi system prompt prefixes stable when boundary-aware cache splitting would otherwise lower cache hits
- carry forward tests from the source PRs and keep the patch scoped to provider/cache conversion

## Source and credit
This Clownfish replacement carries forward the useful work from https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/95311 by @sunlit-deng and https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/94582 by @bowenluo718. Attribution should be preserved in the PR discussion and changelog if this user-facing compatibility fix ships.

## Validation
- pnpm -s vitest run src/agents/openai-transport-stream.test.ts
- pnpm check:changed

Refs: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/issues/94518, https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/95311, https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/94582
credit_notes: Mention #94518 as the hydrated user-facing regression report driving the fix.
